name: Rotary
on: 
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
        
    steps:
      - name: checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1

      - name: Build image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v2
        with:
          context: .
          push: false
          tags: jaicswamy962/rotaryt:latest
          load: true
      
      - name: trivy scan
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: jaicswamy962/rotaryt:latest
          format: 'table'
          exit-code: '1'
          severity: 'HIGH,CRITICAL'
      
      - name: push to dockerhub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
      
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v2
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: jaicswamy962/rotaryt:latest
      
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: echo "Deploying to production environment..."
      
      - name: login to ec2 instance
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.EC2_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.EC2_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.EC2_KEY }}
          script: |
            cd /root || exit 1

            if [ ! -d "Rotarytest" ]; then
              git clone git@github.com:jaiswamy/GrailsDevSecOpsTest.git Rotarytest
            fi

            cd Rotarytest

            docker system prune -a --volumes -f
            docker pull jaicswamy962/rotaryt:latest
            docker-compose down || true
            docker-compose up -d 
            docker system prune -a --volumes -f
